meta_title: For Freelancers: SEO for SaaS to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to SEO for SaaS and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SEO for SaaS to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to SEO for SaaS and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code to build authority and land clients fast.
content.answer_block: To overcome a missing portfolio, build a high-performance SEO landing page for a micro-SaaS niche. Use Antigravity to scaffold the architecture and Claude Code to automate content generation. By ranking for long-tail, high-intent SaaS queries, you demonstrate technical authority, proving your value to clients without needing legacy case studies.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the freelancer’s greatest adversary. You have the skills, but without a portfolio, you are invisible to high-paying clients who demand proof of competency. The industry doesn't care about your resume; it cares about your ability to solve problems that drive measurable search traffic and conversions.

We are going to flip the narrative. Instead of waiting for a client to hand you a project, you will build a high-conversion SaaS landing page that ranks. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid architecture and Claude Code for intelligent, SEO-driven content generation, you turn your own development process into a living, breathing portfolio piece that works 24/7.

steps.title: Define Your Target Niche
steps.description: Select a hyper-specific SaaS problem that has high search volume but low competition. This ensures your portfolio project actually attracts traffic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a SaaS market researcher. Identify 5 high-intent, long-tail keywords for a micro-SaaS tool targeting indie hackers or small business owners. Provide a brief analysis of why these keywords represent low-competition, high-value opportunities.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Research 5 long-tail keywords for a niche SaaS landing page and output in a JSON file named keywords.json'

steps.title: Scaffold the SaaS Landing Page
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate a clean, responsive, and SEO-optimized landing page structure that emphasizes speed and core web vitals.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a modern, responsive landing page template for a SaaS product. Include sections for a hero, feature grid, social proof, and a high-converting CTA. Use Tailwind CSS and ensure the code is semantic and SEO-ready.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate a React landing page component using Tailwind CSS based on the architecture from Antigravity'

steps.title: Automate Content SEO
steps.description: Use Claude Code to write content that answers specific user queries, ensuring your page ranks for the keywords identified in step 1.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a 500-word SEO-optimized hero section and feature description for a SaaS tool. Use the keywords identified earlier, focus on pain-point resolution, and maintain an authoritative, developer-centric tone.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Draft the landing page copy and inject it into the index.tsx file, ensuring H1, H2, and meta tags are properly optimized'

steps.title: Technical SEO Audit
steps.description: Optimize the performance of your build. Claude Code can scan your code to ensure no bloat exists that could hurt your search rankings.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit this codebase for technical SEO improvements. Suggest changes for lazy loading, image optimization, and semantic markup to improve Core Web Vitals.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Analyze current codebase for performance bottlenecks and implement optimization fixes'

steps.title: Deploy and Monitor
steps.description: Ship your project to Vercel or Netlify. This live URL becomes the centerpiece of your portfolio.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a deployment checklist for a production-ready SaaS landing page. Include steps for SSL, caching, and analytics integration.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a deployment script that builds the project and prepares it for production deployment on Vercel'

pro_tips: Treat your landing page like a product: A/B test your H1 tag every week to see which conversion trigger works best.
Embed a 'Build Log' section: Documenting your coding process on the page builds more trust than a generic feature list.
Use JSON-LD schema: Always include structured data for your SaaS tool so Google understands exactly what your product does.
Prioritize page load speed over animations: Google penalizes heavy JS; keep your landing page under 500kb for maximum ranking potential.
Link to your GitHub repo: Clients want to see clean code. Linking the repo directly from the site shows you have nothing to hide.
content.next_steps: Once deployed, use Google Search Console to submit your sitemap. Then, write a 'Building in Public' thread on X/Twitter linking to your new site to generate initial backlinks and traffic.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to turn a blank portfolio into a lead-generation machine. Stop waiting for permission and start building authority that clients can't ignore. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
